---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome to My Portfolio

This website serves as my e-portfolio and was created as part of a continuous assessment component for one of my courses. It brings together selected academic work, projects, and reflections developed throughout my studies in Business Administration and Global Business.

Throughout my studies I have developed experience in areas such as data analysis, research, and business problem-solving. Many of the projects featured in this portfolio involve analysing data, building dashboards, and presenting insights clearly using tools such as Excel and Power BI.

## What You'll Find on This Site:

- **Projects** – Academic and analytical projects completed during my degree  
- **Experience** – Internship and professional experience  
- **Gallery** – Photography and personal interests outside of my academic work

Use the navigation bar above to explore the different sections of the site.
